detail.description: Derek Hill singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Michael Harris II. Braden Montgomery scores.

Derek Hill homers (3) on a fly ball to left center field.

Derek Hill singles on a bunt ground ball to catcher Tyler Heineman. Miguel Vargas scores. Derek Hill to 2nd. Derek Hill advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by catcher Tyler Heineman.
